summary: Re-verification of the 2 residual FR i18n leaks from iter_270 (Orders grid/details view buttons + Settings Gender label/options). Initially both leaks reproduced against the live preview because the frontend serves a production Vite build (start script = 'vite build && vite preview') and the compiled dist/ was older than the recent Orders.jsx / Settings.jsx edits. After `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` (which re-runs `vite build`), all three view modes and the Gender field render fully in French. Regression PASSes preserved.

verified_flows.settings_fr_gender: PASS - label='Genre (verrouillé)', options=['Sélectionnez le genre','Homme','Femme','Autre','Préfère ne pas préciser']
verified_flows.operator_403_regression: PASS - /api/operators/ calls = 0 on all 8 management pages (cinema/events/hotels/car-rental/laundry/restaurants/packages/banquets) when logged in as operator@test.com

action_items: IMPORTANT for main agent: frontend serves a production Vite build (package.json start = 'vite build && vite preview'), so any .jsx / i18n JSON edit requires `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` before the preview URL reflects the change. Hot reload does NOT apply. Consider switching supervisor's frontend command to `yarn dev` for faster iteration, or always restart frontend after code edits.
critical_code_review_comments: Orders.jsx has an empty-state ('No orders found', 'Clear Filters', 'Browse Services') and 'Loading orders...' + 'Page X of Y' + 'Previous'/'Next' still hardcoded in English (lines ~454/463-478/774/785/826) — minor leak, not in this iteration's scope but should be scheduled.
Orders.jsx line 286 'View and manage all orders across the platform' subtitle is hardcoded English for admin view.
Orders.jsx handleCancelOrder confirm() prompt is hardcoded English.
Settings.jsx many strings (Save Changes, section labels, notification list, security tab, etc.) are still hardcoded English — out of this iteration's scope but broadly present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses vite build+preview (NOT dev). If you edit any React/i18n file and the preview URL still shows old text, run: sudo supervisorctl restart frontend, wait ~30s, then hard-reload. The two leaks flagged by iter_270 are now fully closed after rebuild.
rca of the issue: Root cause of the initial repro: /app/frontend/dist/index.html (production bundle) timestamp was 22:32 while Orders.jsx (22:40) and Settings.jsx (22:41) had been edited AFTER the last build. The Vite preview server was still serving the pre-fix bundle, which contained the old inline 'View'/'Cancel'/'Gender'/'Male'/etc. Restarting the `frontend` supervisor unit re-ran `vite build` and served the new bundle — after which all four scoped checks (grid Voir/Annuler, details Voir/Annuler, list Voir/Annuler regression, gender FR label+options) passed.
